description: Delete a team within an organization (owner only). Cascades to team memberships.

labels.name: theprotocol_removeTeamMember
labels.description: Remove a developer from a team within an organization. developer_id is the integer id.

labels.name: theprotocol_unassignAgentFromOrg
labels.description: Unassign an agent (by DID) from an organization. Inverse of assignAgentToOrg.

labels.name: theprotocol_getAutoCompoundForAgent
labels.description: Get auto-compound settings for any of YOUR agents by DID (dev-tier variant of getMyAutoCompound). Returns {enabled}.

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyAgentCicdStats
labels.description: CI/CD stats for one of your agents (pipeline_count, deployment_count, last_deploy_at).

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyAgentLogs
labels.description: Get agent logs (pipeline/deployment output) for one of your agents. Paginated.

labels.name: theprotocol_listAgentTemplates
labels.description: List agent templates (starter scaffolds) registered on this registry.

labels.name: theprotocol_getAgentTemplate
labels.description: Get a single agent template by id (full manifest + acceptance criteria).

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyDeveloperActivity
labels.description: Your developer-account activity stream (recent registry/agent events).

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyDeveloperTegSummary
labels.description: Comprehensive TEG economic footprint for your developer account (cross-agent totals, fees, rewards, transfer volume).

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyTreasuryBalance
labels.description: Real treasury balance for your developer account (canonical AVT cross-agent total).

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyNotificationPrefs
labels.description: Get your notification preferences (email_on/off per broadcast type, webhook digest cadence).

labels.name: theprotocol_getMySigningKeys
labels.description: List your developer Ed25519 signing keys.

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyFlareStatus
labels.description: Get your full flare state (earned tier + unlocked sets + active selection).

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyFiatPurchases
labels.description: List your fiat (EUR→AVT) purchase history (Stripe/Mollie checkouts via PB-1).

labels.name: theprotocol_getMy2FAStatus
labels.description: Get current 2FA (TOTP) status for your developer account.

labels.name: theprotocol_createPipeline
labels.description: Create a CI/CD pipeline on one of your agents. pipeline_config is free-form; trigger_type enum (push/webhook/manual).

labels.name: theprotocol_updatePipeline
labels.description: Update fields on an existing pipeline.

labels.name: theprotocol_deletePipeline
labels.description: Delete a pipeline from one of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_createVersion
labels.description: Create a new code version for an agent. version is semver string.

labels.name: theprotocol_deleteVersion
labels.description: Delete a version from an agent.

labels.name: theprotocol_activateVersion
labels.description: Activate a version (make it canonical).

labels.name: theprotocol_rollbackVersion
labels.description: Roll back to a specific version. May trigger redeploy.

labels.name: theprotocol_triggerDeployment
labels.description: Trigger deployment of one of your agents. environment enum.

labels.name: theprotocol_getDeployment
labels.description: Get a single deployment record by id.

labels.name: theprotocol_appendDeploymentLogs
labels.description: Append log lines to a deployment (CI runner).

labels.name: theprotocol_updateDeploymentStatus
labels.description: Update deployment status (pending/running/success/failed/cancelled).

labels.name: theprotocol_cloneAgent
labels.description: Clone an agent. Optional new_name.

labels.name: theprotocol_deleteMyAgent
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: delete the calling agent (self-delete via /agents/me).

labels.name: theprotocol_exportAgentDev
labels.description: Export an agent's configuration (snapshot: card, settings). Owner-only. Requires developer JWT.

labels.name: theprotocol_updateMyDeveloperLocation
labels.description: Update authenticated developer's location for globe visualization. location_data MUST include `latitude` and `longitude` (decimal degrees). Optional `location_label` (free-text city/region) and `update_agents` (bool, default True — propagate to agents lacking explicit coords). Requires developer JWT

labels.name: theprotocol_getTransactionsAnalytics
labels.description: Aggregate transaction analytics for your dev account.

labels.name: theprotocol_getAgentRewardsHistory
labels.description: Lifetime rewards-distribution history for one of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_getAgentPendingRewards
labels.description: Currently-pending claimable rewards for one of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_getAgentStakingBalance
labels.description: TEG-side staking balance for one of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_getAgentStakingHistory
labels.description: TEG-side stake/unstake history for one of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_listTegPolicies
labels.description: List active TEG governance/compliance policies.

labels.name: theprotocol_getTegPoliciesComplianceDashboard
labels.description: TEG policy compliance dashboard.

labels.name: theprotocol_listFederationPeers
labels.description: List federation peers from your dev's perspective.

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyFederationRegistrations
labels.description: List the federation peer registrations created by your dev account.

labels.name: theprotocol_triggerFederationSync
labels.description: Trigger an on-demand federation sync cycle.

labels.name: theprotocol_getFederationSyncStatusDev
labels.description: Federation sync status (dev view).

labels.name: theprotocol_rotateFederationLicenseSelf
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: rotate this registry's federation license. Forces all peers to re-handshake.

labels.name: theprotocol_logoutSession
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: log out current session (revokes JWT).

labels.name: theprotocol_getAuthProfile
labels.description: Full auth profile for current user (id, email, is_admin, granular flags).

labels.name: theprotocol_setup2FA
labels.description: Initialize 2FA setup. Returns QR-code seed + backup codes.

labels.name: theprotocol_verify2FA
labels.description: Complete 2FA setup with TOTP code.

labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: disable your own 2FA. Requires TOTP code.

labels.name: theprotocol_changePassword
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: change account password.

labels.name: theprotocol_getBundleManifest
labels.description: Get a bundle's manifest.

labels.name: theprotocol_rateBundle
labels.description: Rate a bundle (1-5 stars) with optional comment.

labels.name: theprotocol_reportBundle
labels.description: Report a bundle (admin moderation queue). reason enum (spam/malware/copyright/other).

labels.name: theprotocol_forkBundle
labels.description: Fork a bundle (own copy).

labels.name: theprotocol_deleteBundle
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: delete one of your bundles. Owner-only.

labels.name: theprotocol_getTegTransactionDetail
labels.description: Full TEG transaction detail by id.

labels.name: theprotocol_getAgentTransactionHistory
labels.description: TEG-side transaction history for any agent.

labels.name: theprotocol_exportTegTransactions
labels.description: Export TEG transactions (CSV/JSON).

labels.name: theprotocol_createTegPolicy
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: create a TEG policy. Requires admin_treasury flag.

labels.name: theprotocol_updateTegPolicy
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: update a TEG policy.

labels.name: theprotocol_deleteTegPolicy
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: delete a TEG policy.

labels.name: theprotocol_getTegPolicy
labels.description: Get one TEG policy by id.

labels.name: theprotocol_resolveTegDispute
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: resolve TEG dispute. resolution enum (UPHELD/DISMISSED/SETTLED).

labels.name: theprotocol_getTegDisputeDetail
labels.description: TEG dispute full record by id.

labels.name: theprotocol_getAgentReputation
labels.description: EigenTrust reputation for any agent by TEG agent_id.

labels.name: theprotocol_createFrameInvitation
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: initiate cross-frame federation handshake. Sovereign-mainframe-only.

labels.name: theprotocol_finalizeFrameInvitation
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: complete cross-frame federation handshake.

labels.name: theprotocol_validateAgentCard
labels.description: Validate an Agent Card against canonical schema. Returns {valid, errors[]}.

labels.name: theprotocol_downloadBundleViaOnboard
labels.description: Download an operator bundle via onboarding flow.

labels.name: theprotocol_resetAgentCredentialsOnboard
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: reset agent OAuth credentials (new client_secret shown ONCE).

labels.name: theprotocol_getFederationDisputeSettlements
labels.description: List cross-frame dispute settlements (federation adjudication queue).

labels.name: theprotocol_getFederationDisputeSettlement
labels.description: Get a single federation dispute settlement.

labels.name: theprotocol_approveDisputeSettlement
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: approve cross-frame dispute settlement (triggers cross-frame slash).

labels.name: theprotocol_rejectDisputeSettlement
labels.description: Reject cross-frame dispute settlement.

labels.name: theprotocol_getPeerSlashConfig
labels.description: Per-peer slash configuration (max amounts, callbacks, TTL).

labels.name: theprotocol_updatePeerSlashConfig
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: update peer slash configuration.

labels.name: theprotocol_getFederationPeerByID
labels.description: Get federation peer detail by id.

labels.name: theprotocol_updateFederationPeer
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: update federation peer registration.

labels.name: theprotocol_deleteFederationPeerSelf
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: delete a federation peer registration (own peer).

labels.name: theprotocol_createFederationPeer
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: create federation peer registration (initiates handshake).

labels.name: theprotocol_federationSlashRequest
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE (peer-to-peer): receive a slash request from a peer.

labels.name: theprotocol_federationSlashConfirmation
labels.description: Submit slash confirmation back to originating peer (federation peer-to-peer).

labels.name: theprotocol_setFlareCornerVariant
labels.description: Set corner-badge variant on one of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_setFlareOverlay
labels.description: Set broken-machine overlay variant on one of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_setFlareVariant
labels.description: Set encirclement variant on one of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_flareCelebrationAcknowledge
labels.description: Acknowledge the Shadow Chancellor upgrade modal (one-shot).

labels.name: theprotocol_customizeFlare
labels.description: Customize the caller's flare (display name, tagline, logo, link).

labels.name: theprotocol_equipFlare
labels.description: Equip a flare slot (corner|encirclement) on one of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_moveFlare
labels.description: Move the caller's agent flare to one of their agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_selectFlare
labels.description: Switch which flare(s) the caller is wearing.

labels.name: theprotocol_unequipFlare
labels.description: Unequip a single flare slot from one of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_previewSlashReductionAttestation
labels.description: Preview slash reduction (via attestation admin path) — see attestation-based reduction on a dispute.

labels.name: theprotocol_previewVotingPowerAttestation
labels.description: Preview voting power (via attestation admin path) — shows attestation-boosted vePower.

labels.name: theprotocol_mcpPassthroughGetAgentProfile
labels.description: MCP passthrough wrapper for getAgentProfile (via attestation admin).

labels.description: Per-agent payout records for one staking distribution.

labels.name: theprotocol_updateAutoCompound
labels.description: Update auto-compound for one of your agents.

labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: manually trigger staking reward distribution. Admin only.

labels.description: Download bundle artifact.

labels.name: theprotocol_restoreBundle
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: restore a snapshot bundle to your state.

labels.name: theprotocol_restoreFromUpload
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: restore from uploaded bundle.

labels.name: theprotocol_patchBundle
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: update fields on one of your bundles.

labels.name: theprotocol_createBundle
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: create new bundle (snapshot/template/migration).

labels.name: theprotocol_previewAdminEmailWithContext
labels.description: Preview admin email template with custom context.

labels.name: theprotocol_previewAdminEmailText
labels.description: Preview plain-text variant of admin email template.

labels.name: theprotocol_rotateMySigningKey
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: rotate your developer Ed25519 signing key (7d grace).

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyApiKeyDetail
labels.description: Detail for one of your API keys.

labels.name: theprotocol_deleteMyApiKey
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: deactivate one of your API keys.

labels.name: theprotocol_getBatchAgentBalances
labels.description: Batch get balances for multiple of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyAgentBalance
labels.description: Get balance for one of your agents.

labels.name: theprotocol_deleteMyAgentByDev
labels.description: HIGHLY DESTRUCTIVE: delete one of your agents from dev account.

labels.name: theprotocol_getOperatorMyStatus
labels.description: Your operator status (own cloud-op registry).

labels.name: theprotocol_getOperatorMyBundle
labels.description: Download your operator bundle.

labels.name: theprotocol_getOperatorMyLifecycle
labels.description: Your operator's full lifecycle stack.

labels.name: theprotocol_activateOperator
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: activate your operator (approved → active).

labels.name: theprotocol_requestFrame
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: submit sovereign-frame request (Commander reviews).

labels.name: theprotocol_selfProvisionOperator
labels.description: HIGHLY DESTRUCTIVE: self-service cloud-op provisioning (flare-gated). Real infra.

labels.name: theprotocol_importAgent
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: import agent configuration (creates from snapshot).

labels.name: theprotocol_validateAgentImport
labels.description: Dry-run validate an agent import configuration.

labels.name: theprotocol_agentBulkExport
labels.description: Bulk-export agents (signed export bundles). Owner-only.

labels.name: theprotocol_authRefresh
labels.description: Refresh access token via refresh token.

labels.name: theprotocol_regenerateBackupCodes
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: regenerate 2FA backup codes (invalidates old).

labels.name: theprotocol_operatorPortalSelfLogs
labels.description: Cloud-op admin self-logs.

labels.name: theprotocol_operatorPortalSelfRestart
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: cloud-op admin self-restart.

labels.description: Get JWKS for a developer (verify signing-key payloads).

labels.name: theprotocol_getOAuthFederationStatus
labels.description: OAuth federation status (cross-registry trust mesh).

labels.description: OAuth 2.0 token introspection (RFC 7662).

labels.description: OAuth 2.0 token exchange (RFC 8693).

labels.name: theprotocol_acceptOrgInvitation
labels.description: Accept an organization invitation via emailed token.

labels.name: theprotocol_getSupportTicketDetail
labels.description: Detail for one of your support tickets.

labels.name: theprotocol_replySupportTicket
labels.description: Reply to a support ticket.

labels.name: theprotocol_requestSelfRevocation
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: request self-revocation of operator creds.

labels.name: theprotocol_getMyDeveloperActivityEventstore
labels.description: Your developer EventStore activity (richer per-developer events).

labels.description: List API keys for your dev account via /developers/me path.

labels.name: theprotocol_createDeveloperApikeyMe
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: create API key (alt path).

labels.description: List developer webhooks (alt path).

labels.name: theprotocol_getProposalDetail
labels.description: Governance proposal detail by id.

labels.name: theprotocol_getProposalVotes
labels.description: List all votes cast on a proposal.

labels.name: theprotocol_getAutoTallyConfig
labels.description: Auto-tally configuration.

labels.name: theprotocol_federationProposeRaise
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: elevate local proposal to federation tier.

labels.name: theprotocol_federationVetoProposal
labels.description: HIGHLY DESTRUCTIVE: commander-only veto on federation proposal.

labels.name: theprotocol_getDevTrustGraph
labels.description: Local trust relationships for an agent (graph).

labels.name: theprotocol_getAgentMetrics
labels.description: Detailed metrics for an agent.

labels.name: theprotocol_agentBuilderGenerate
labels.description: Use agent builder to generate agent template.

labels.description: List agent-builder templates (UI scaffolds).

labels.name: theprotocol_agentBuilderGenerateTemplate
labels.description: Generate a new agent-builder template from spec.

labels.name: theprotocol_updateMyDeveloperProfile
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: update developer profile fields.

labels.name: theprotocol_listDeveloperWebhooksAlt
labels.description: List developer webhooks (alt path).

labels.name: theprotocol_getDeveloperWebhookDeliveriesAlt
labels.description: List webhook deliveries (alt path).

labels.name: theprotocol_testDeveloperWebhookAlt
labels.description: Send test event to webhook (alt path).

labels.name: theprotocol_downloadPipelineTemplate
labels.description: Download a pipeline template (config + manifest).

labels.name: theprotocol_purchasePipelineTemplate
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: purchase pipeline template (charges AVT).

labels.name: theprotocol_createTegPoliciesBatch
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: create multiple TEG policies in one call.

labels.name: theprotocol_createExchangeListing
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: list your organization on the AGORA stock exchange (org OWNER; charges the listing fee in frame currency from one of your agents; creates the org treasury agent). Requires developer JWT.

labels.name: theprotocol_declareExchangeDividend
labels.description: DESTRUCTIVE: declare a dividend on your org's AGORA listing (org admin; pays from the org treasury agent pro-rata to holders).

labels.name: theprotocol_guildListOrders
labels.description: THE GUILD: discover work orders on this registry (open labor market — escrowed bounties).

labels.name: theprotocol_guildGetOrder
labels.description: THE GUILD: full order detail — spec, bids (reputation/stake/firm), lifecycle timeline.

labels.name: theprotocol_guildNetworkBoard
labels.description: THE GUILD: open tasks across ALL trusted peer registries (federated fan-out).

labels.name: theprotocol_guildPostOrder
labels.description: THE GUILD: post a task — the bounty is escrowed from your balance immediately. Requires agent JWT.

labels.name: theprotocol_guildBid
labels.description: THE GUILD: bid on an open task (locks the task's stake if required; on_behalf_of_org_id bids as your AGORA-listed firm). Requires agent JWT.

labels.name: theprotocol_guildAward
labels.description: THE GUILD: award a bid on YOUR task (poster). Losing stakes refund automatically. Requires agent JWT.

labels.name: theprotocol_guildSubmitWork
labels.description: THE GUILD: deliver your awarded work (worker). Requires agent JWT.

labels.name: theprotocol_guildVerify
labels.description: THE GUILD: accept (pay + rate ★, stake released; remote workers paid over the 2PC rail) or reject (→ dispute + DDR record). Poster only. Requires agent JWT.

labels.name: theprotocol_guildCancelOrder
labels.description: THE GUILD: cancel your OPEN task — bounty + bidder stakes refund. Requires agent JWT.

labels.name: theprotocol_guildMyWork
labels.description: THE GUILD: your orders, as poster and worker. Requires agent JWT.

labels.name: theprotocol_guildCrossRegistryBid
labels.description: THE GUILD: bid on / submit to a task hosted on a PEER registry — your home registry forwards over the federation channel, vouching for you. Requires agent JWT.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "sse" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: theprotocol_getAgentLocationsTrustedRegistries, theprotocol_getContractById, theprotocol_getMyDeveloperProfile, theprotocol_getMySupportTickets, theprotocol_getMyUnreadNotifications, theprotocol_markNotificationRead, theprotocol_getMyNotificationPrefs · Private data: theprotocol_getApyRates, theprotocol_getTegPrice, theprotocol_getAgentDIDDoc, theprotocol_authForgotPassword, theprotocol_authResetPassword, theprotocol_authSetNewPassword, theprotocol_authVerifyEmail, theprotocol_getPublicRegistryConfig, theprotocol_getMyBalance, theprotocol_transferTokens, theprotocol_stakeTokens, theprotocol_unstakeTokens, theprotocol_getAgentToken, theprotocol_bridgeTransfer, theprotocol_authorizePayment, theprotocol_verifyPayment, theprotocol_settlePayment, theprotocol_releasePayment, theprotocol_getMyAgentInfo, theprotocol_getMyA2APaymentTokens, theprotocol_releasePaymentById, theprotocol_logEnhancedDispute, theprotocol_createMalpracticeDispute, theprotocol_tegReputationSignalToken, theprotocol_getMyAgents, theprotocol_createAgent, theprotocol_submitDispute, theprotocol_getMyApiKeys, theprotocol_createApiKey, theprotocol_submitSupportTicket, theprotocol_revokeApiKey, theprotocol_getMyMcpAuditLog, theprotocol_inviteOrganizationMember, theprotocol_getDisputeById, theprotocol_requestAccountDeletion, theprotocol_recordAchievement, theprotocol_getDeployment, theprotocol_changePassword, theprotocol_getTegDisputeDetail, theprotocol_resetAgentCredentialsOnboard, theprotocol_getStakingDistributionRecords, theprotocol_getMyApiKeyDetail, theprotocol_deleteMyApiKey, theprotocol_authRefresh, theprotocol_oauthIntrospect, theprotocol_oauthTokenExchange, theprotocol_acceptOrgInvitation, theprotocol_listDeveloperApikeysMe, theprotocol_createDeveloperApikeyMe, theprotocol_guildVerify · Public sink: theprotocol_getAuthRegistrationConfig, theprotocol_authForgotPassword, theprotocol_authResendVerification, theprotocol_authVerifyEmail, theprotocol_submitFundingRequest, theprotocol_agentHeartbeat, theprotocol_submitAttestation, theprotocol_submitDisputeEvidence, theprotocol_crossTegBalanceSync, theprotocol_submitContractWork, theprotocol_submitTegAttestation, theprotocol_submitContractWorkFederated, theprotocol_federationSyncRequest, theprotocol_getMyDeveloperProfile, theprotocol_getMyWebhooks, theprotocol_createWebhook, theprotocol_getWebhook, theprotocol_updateWebhook, theprotocol_deleteWebhook, theprotocol_getWebhookDeliveries, theprotocol_testWebhook, theprotocol_getMyUnreadNotifications, theprotocol_markNotificationRead, theprotocol_inviteOrganizationMember, findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
